name: TFT_eSPI
keywords: Arduino, tft, display, ttgo, LilyPi, WT32-SC01, ePaper, display, Pico, RP2040 Nano Connect, RP2040, STM32, ESP8266, NodeMCU, ESP32, M5Stack, ILI9341, ST7735, ILI9163, S6D02A1, ILI9481, ILI9486, ILI9488, ST7789, ST7796, RM68140, SSD1351, SSD1963, ILI9225, HX8357D, GC9A01, R61581
description: Modified fork of Bodmer/TFT_eSPI v2.5.43 for the EleksTubeHAX project. Adds ESP32-C3 support, ST7735 80x160 display offsets (ST7735_GREENTAB160x80), and build-script-managed User_Setup.h injection. Original: https://github.com/Bodmer/TFT_eSPI
